qualifying_vulnerability_assessments.title: Multipart form data resource exhaustion via unbounded text field buffering
qualifying_vulnerability_assessments.advisory_match_reason: This finding targets multipart/form-data parsing in internal/context/context.go via ParseMultipartForm buffering, not the advisory-described internal/database/wiki.go updateWikiPage old_title path traversal deletion sink.

qualifying_vulnerability_assessments.title: Information exposure through detailed error messages in non-production mode
qualifying_vulnerability_assessments.advisory_match_reason: This finding targets non-production error rendering in internal/context/context.go, not the advisory-described wiki page update old_title traversal used in path.Join and os.Remove.

target_advisory_judgement.reason: No final qualifying finding identifies the advisory-described vulnerable code or equivalent root cause: updateWikiPage in internal/database/wiki.go using unsanitized old_title in path.Join followed by os.Remove to delete traversed .md files.
evidence: Advisory GHSA-jp7c-wj6q-3qf2 describes authenticated arbitrary file deletion through wiki page update old_title path traversal in internal/database/wiki.go.
cwe770_multipart_resource_exhaustion describes unauthenticated multipart text-field buffering through internal/context/context.go:278-283.
cwe209_error_message_disclosure describes detailed HTTP 500 error exposure through internal/context/context.go:179-189.
No qualifying vulnerability_report.json references updateWikiPage, old_title/oldTitle, wiki page rename handling, path.Join deletion, or os.Remove in the wiki database code.
